description: Cluster-wide etcd health, member counts, and aggregate consensus metrics via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Collects cluster-level etcd metrics from Thanos using aggregate PromQL with vector(0) fallbacks.
name: Etcd_Cluster_Overview
